extension.summary: Shows Jellyfin trickplay seek thumbnails during video scrubbing.
extension.description: Reads or generates Jellyfin trickplay sprite tiles alongside your media, crops preview frames while you scrub, and shows them via DialogSeekBar skin properties. Optional ffmpeg generator writes .trickplay sidecars; use Install preview tools in add-on settings (or batch Run) to download ffmpeg. Copy resources/skin-snippet/DialogSeekBar-skin.estuary.modv2.xml into your active skin and rename it DialogSeekBar.xml (take backup of old xml first!). Requires ffmpeg, ffprobe, dovi_tool for generation/HDR.
